CustomField.description: The value of Total_Processing_Cycles__c at the last execution that made measurable progress (Components_Analyzed__c increased). Reset to Total_Processing_Cycles__c whenever Components_Analyzed__c increases. Stall condition: Total_Processing_Cycles__c - Last_Successful_Cycle__c >= Stall_Detection_Threshold__c. Persisted on the job record so it survives across Queueable self-chain boundaries. Do not edit manually. Ref: ISP-6072
CustomField.label: Last Successful Cycle
